pages.title: Pucora API Gateway Documentation
pages.description: Access the documentation for Pucora API Gateway, including guides, tutorials, and reference materials for its implementation

pages.title: Event-Driven Async Agents
pages.description: Learn how to leverage asynchronous processing in Pucora API Gateway to implement an event based pattern

pages.title: AMQP driver for Async Agent
pages.description: Leverage Asynchronous AMQP Agents in Pucora for high-performance messaging and event-driven architectures

pages.title: Kafka Async Driver
pages.description: Background Kafka consumer agents that forward events to internal webhooks

pages.title: Intro to AuthZ and AuthN
pages.description: Overview of the options available to integrate authentication and authorization services with Pucora API Gateway for secure access control to your APIs

pages.title: Auth0 integration
pages.description: Integrate Auth0 authentication and authorization services with Pucora API Gateway for secure and seamless access control to your APIs

pages.title: OAuth2 Client credentials
pages.description: Learn how to implement OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials (2-legged flow) with Pucora API Gateway to secure your APIs for machine-to-machine communication

pages.title: Descope integration
pages.description: Learn how to integrate Descope authorization with Pucora API Gateway for secure and controlled access to your APIs.

pages.title: JWK key caching
pages.description: Implement shared JWK caching for efficient authorization in Pucora. Learn how to cache and manage JSON Web Key (JWK) sets to optimize authorization's performance.

pages.title: JWT overview
pages.description: Gain an overview of JSON Web Tokens (JWT) and learn how to implement JWT-based authorization with Pucora API Gateway for secure API access

pages.title: JWT Signing
pages.description: Pucora's JWT signing wraps your login endpoint, signing payloads with your secret key. Perfect for monolith migrations or setups without an OAuth server.

pages.title: JWT Validation
pages.description: Implement JWT validation with Pucora API Gateway to secure your APIs and prevent unauthorized access.

pages.title: Keycloak integration
pages.description: Learn how to integrate Keycloak authorization with Pucora API Gateway for secure and controlled access to your APIs.

pages.title: Mutual TLS Authentication (mTLS)
pages.description: Implement mutual authentication in Pucora API Gateway to establish a secure and trusted communication channel between clients and APIs

pages.title: Revoking tokens
pages.description: Learn how to implement token revocation mechanisms in Pucora API Gateway to manage and invalidate access tokens when needed

pages.title: The backend object
pages.description: Explore the backend configuration options in Pucora API Gateway, allowing you to connect and integrate with your microservices efficiently

pages.title: RabbitMQ Consumer
pages.description: Integrate AMQP consumers into Pucora API Gateway for seamless communication with message queue systems like RabbitMQ

pages.title: RabbitMQ Producer
pages.description: Integrate AMQP producers with Pucora for seamless communication with backend systems. Follow our documentation to set up reliable and scalable messaging with Advanced Message Queuing Protocol (AMQP).

pages.title: Response caching
pages.description: Learn how to implement effective caching strategies in Pucora API Gateway to improve API performance and reduce backend load

pages.title: Circuit Breaker
pages.description: Implement the circuit breaker pattern in Pucora API Gateway to enhance the resilience and stability of your API ecosystem

pages.description: Explore data manipulation capabilities in Pucora API Gateway, enabling transformation and manipulation of response data

pages.description: Implement returning of backend headers and errors to provide informative and customized error messages to API consumers

pages.description: Integrate the FlatMap backend into Pucora API Gateway for array data transformation and mapping operations in your API ecosystem

pages.description: Call upstream gRPC services from REST endpoints using a protobuf catalog

pages.description: The HTTP client options allow you to configure the behavior to connect to your backends using HTTP

pages.description: Learn how to integrate the Martian component into Pucora API Gateway, enabling static request and response transformations for your APIs

pages.description: Performance tests of Pucora running on a local machine (laptop) with measurements of different concurrency levels.
